generated_assessment.reasoning: This woman's very high agreeableness (especially trust at 84th percentile) and tender-mindedness (82nd) predispose her to initially trust mainstream journalism, and her high openness (90th) makes her receptive to its narratives. It is within plausible range. The heuristic checks passed. So plausibility and consistency should be high. No rewrite needed. Notes: none.
